name: golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-gcpkms-dev
title: golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-gcpkms-dev
summary: Extension to Tink Go for Google Cloud KMS integration (library)
description:
Extension to Tink Go for Google Cloud KMS integration (library)
Tink Go Google Cloud Key Management Service (KMS) extension.
.
This package contains the Go development library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-gcpkms-dev because Extension to Tink Go for Google Cloud KMS integration (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-gcpkms-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-gcpkms-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-gcpkms-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
